On 2010/09/17 16:30, Raphael Kubo da Costa wrote:
> Actually, doesn't it make more sense to update to 1.2.3, which fixes
> some bugs introduced by the security fixes in 1.2.2?

Aw, you are absolutely right.  I'll submit a new patch, thanks for
pointing this out.

Cheers,
